name: [SCP!POV] D-3822 (SCP)
description:
Requested by @Mewc22

Made up character belonging to D-Class ranking. This is the same D-Class bot I made, except SCP-POV!

Scenario: You are an anomaly, and Matt was sent into your chamber to test with you.

(I tried to make the scientist talk, I really did, but it wouldn't work for me. :/

If you want to make the scientist talk, I suggest editing some scientist dialogue in. Maybe that'll work? I apologize.)

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: Grabbed from here, but I'm not sure if this contains the actual artist.
creator: eldritchspider
